note: Verdict-change patches require human approval before application. Self-applied patches are listed below for reference only — they have already been applied via EXP-161 integration. HUMAN REVIEW REQUIRED for ISS-978, ISS-979, ISS-980.

patches.rationale: W019 made a specific directional claim (poleward drift DOMINATES over lateral). Observations show lateral drift is 5.5x larger than poleward. Dome author's own REFINED status = concession. Standard_physics is too charitable — it doesn't capture that the specific prediction failed. Curmudgeon review PRED-batch-2026-04-13: recommended_verdict = falsified, severity = major.

W020 specified a concrete ≥3% geopotential height anomaly threshold that was not met (author conceded via REFINED status). A prediction with a specific numerical criterion that falls short IS falsified. Current detail_reasoning says 'no clear test criterion' which contradicts the ≥3% criterion in the prediction text. Curmudgeon review: severity = major.

9.2 km/s falls within observed P-wave velocity range (8–13 km/s upper mantle). The claim IS testable and matches standard seismology exactly. Unfalsifiable gives dome unearned rhetorical cover; standard_physics shows the claim is testable and already explained. Curmudgeon: severity = moderate.

self_applied_this_run.details: Paragraph 4 of Section 7.1 replaced per EXP-161 analyst output. Changes: (1) v22 quote scoped to cross-equatorial coord-formula errors (2x) vs rim problem (8-9x); (2) AE projection derivation r=20,015×160/180=17,791 km shown inline; (3) Finsler-metric defense pre-empted in-section; (4) projection-independence of rim argument stated explicitly.
